findings.description: No heading structure present in the HTML. The document is essentially a single image (nautical chart) with no text content requiring headings, so this is acceptable for this document type.
findings.evidence: HTML contains no h1-h6 elements. The PDF is a nautical chart image with no structured text sections.

findings.description: The HTML contains nested duplicate <main> elements, which is a structural duplication.
findings.evidence: HTML has <main> inside <main>: '<body><main><main><figure>...' — two nested <main> tags.

findings.description: The alt text is reasonably accurate and descriptive of the nautical chart content, mentioning Cape Lookout, Lookout Bight, Lighthouse Bay, Barden Inlet, depth soundings, and navigational aids — all of which appear on the chart.
findings.evidence: Alt text: 'Nautical chart of Cape Lookout, Lookout Bight, Lighthouse Bay, and Barden Inlet showing depth soundings and navigational aids'
